{"speakerLines":["**System Audio:** [Music playing]

**Staff:** Hello?

**Customer:** Hello?

**Staff:** Yeah, good afternoon sir, Aditya calling from Barbeque Nation Head Office. So yesterday you visited the Gaur Mall outlet for lunch?

**Customer:** Yes.

**Staff:** The call will be recorded for improvement. Sir, how was your overall experience yesterday?

**Customer:** Very bad experience.

**Staff:** Thank you so much, sir. And how did you like the service and ambience inside the restaurant?

**Customer:** There was no problem with the service and ambience. If a few things are ignored, the service was also okay. It was fine.

**Staff:** Alright. And sir, food quality, like starters, main course?

**Customer:** Not at all. Maybe you guys are not maintaining your quality. I was very disappointed. At one time, we used to enjoy your food and quality with family, but this time... I have visited twice recently, and both times I didn't get that quality.

**Staff:** Sir, in veg or non-veg? Or both?

**Customer:** I am talking about veg right now.

**Staff:** Yes sir, I will mention this regarding the quality.

**Customer:** In non-veg, it feels like they make one single gravy and dip everything in it; we can tell. Plus, they don't fry it properly. And the paneer I ate—paneer is an attraction for vegetarians—what they do is apply some simple spice and put it on the skewer and give it. We can do that at our home too. There is nothing like paneer tikka, no tandoori flavor, no tikka flavor. At least make a pakoda by coating it in gram flour, but even that wasn't there. We can do that at home—bring a packet of two or three spices, add curd, and eat it on a skewer. It couldn't even be eaten. Paneer is an attraction, but even that isn't good. Neither is the gravy good. The gravy is such that if you eat at a simple roadside dhaba, you won't get such bad gravy as what you provided.

**Staff:** Hmm.

**Customer:** I am really sorry for all the inconvenience you had yesterday, sir. I will highlight this to the management.

**Customer:** Don't say sorry to me. I know, I have told them as well. There is no point in saying sorry to me; my money and time are both gone. I think if you guys fix this among yourselves, it will benefit you and your business.

**Staff:** Definitely sir, we will try to improve the quality and all. So sir, how many people visited yesterday?

**Customer:** Yesterday only two of us visited, and before that, four people visited. In approximately two weeks, we have visited twice, and a total of six people have visited.

**Staff:** Okay sir. Alright. Thank you so much for your time and feedback, sir. Have a good day.

**Customer:** Okay."],"language_code":"en-US","transcription_id":"gemini-1772739005594","language_probability":"1"}

**System Audio:** [Music playing]

**Staff:** Hello?

**Customer:** Hello?

**Staff:** Yeah, good afternoon sir, Aditya calling from Barbeque Nation Head Office. So yesterday you visited the Gaur Mall outlet for lunch?

**Customer:** Yes.

**Staff:** The call will be recorded for improvement. Sir, how was your overall experience yesterday?

**Customer:** Very bad experience.

**Staff:** Thank you so much, sir. And how did you like the service and ambience inside the restaurant?

**Customer:** There was no problem with the service and ambience. If a few things are ignored, the service was also okay. It was fine.

**Staff:** Alright. And sir, food quality, like starters, main course?

**Customer:** Not at all. Maybe you guys are not maintaining your quality. I was very disappointed. At one time, we used to enjoy your food and quality with family, but this time... I have visited twice recently, and both times I didn't get that quality.

**Staff:** Sir, in veg or non-veg? Or both?

**Customer:** I am talking about veg right now.

**Staff:** Yes sir, I will mention this regarding the quality.

**Customer:** In non-veg, it feels like they make one single gravy and dip everything in it; we can tell. Plus, they don't fry it properly. And the paneer I ate—paneer is an attraction for vegetarians—what they do is apply some simple spice and put it on the skewer and give it. We can do that at our home too. There is nothing like paneer tikka, no tandoori flavor, no tikka flavor. At least make a pakoda by coating it in gram flour, but even that wasn't there. We can do that at home—bring a packet of two or three spices, add curd, and eat it on a skewer. It couldn't even be eaten. Paneer is an attraction, but even that isn't good. Neither is the gravy good. The gravy is such that if you eat at a simple roadside dhaba, you won't get such bad gravy as what you provided.

**Staff:** Hmm.

**Customer:** I am really sorry for all the inconvenience you had yesterday, sir. I will highlight this to the management.

**Customer:** Don't say sorry to me. I know, I have told them as well. There is no point in saying sorry to me; my money and time are both gone. I think if you guys fix this among yourselves, it will benefit you and your business.

**Staff:** Definitely sir, we will try to improve the quality and all. So sir, how many people visited yesterday?

**Customer:** Yesterday only two of us visited, and before that, four people visited. In approximately two weeks, we have visited twice, and a total of six people have visited.

**Staff:** Okay sir. Alright. Thank you so much for your time and feedback, sir. Have a good day.

**Customer:** Okay.

**Staff:** Good afternoon ma'am. My name is Aman Raj. I am calling from the Barbeque Nation Head Office. Ma'am, as this is a feedback call, this call is being recorded for our improvement. Yesterday, ma'am, you went to Pacific Mall for lunch, so how was your experience there?

**Customer:** My experience was very good, sir.

**Staff:** Thank you ma'am. And how did you like the taste of the starter and buffet, ma'am?

**Customer:** Everything was very good, sir. We were served by a person named Akash, and he was a very great person according to me.

**Staff:** Okay ma'am, I am mentioning his name. And how many members visited the outlet yesterday, ma'am?

**Customer:** We were four people, sir.

**Staff:** Okay ma'am. Did you try the Kulfi and drinks? How was the taste?

**Customer:** Yes, yes. Kulfi and drinks were also very good. I was very happy with the service.

**Staff:** And lastly, ma'am, how was the booking and billing experience?

**Customer:** Booking and that... billing was also very correct, sir. They cooperated with us a lot.

**Staff:** Okay ma'am. Apart from this, would you like to give any suggestions, ma'am?

**Customer:** I don't have anything else, sir, but I just want that if they... like before booking, if they tell us something like... we didn't know that shakes etc. are... they are extra payable, you know? So sir, if they tell us a bit beforehand, then we can customize according to ourselves, as everyone has a budget. So in that way, right? There are many such shakes which are payable, except the buffet, right? So otherwise there was no problem, sir. Everything else was great.

**Staff:** Okay ma'am, I have noted down this particular point and will forward it to my concerned team. If they tell you beforehand that these things you have to pay for separately and these are within your buffet, then it would be a bit easy for you.

**Customer:** Easy, of course. 

**Staff:** Okay ma'am, and thank you so much ma'am for giving your valuable feedback and time. Hope to see you soon at Barbeque Nation. Thank you ma'am.

**Customer:** Yes, yes. Please mention your name, sir.

**Staff:** Sure ma'am, I am mentioning my name, Aman.

**Customer:** I felt very good talking to you. Okay, thank you so much.

**Staff:** Most welcome.

**System Audio:** [Ringing tones]

**Staff:** Hello?

**Customer:** Hello.

**Staff:** Yes, who is this?

**Customer:** Hello ma'am, I am Sneha calling from Barbeque Nation Head Office.

**Staff:** Yes.

**Customer:** Ma'am, this is a short feedback call being recorded for our improvement. You went for dinner at Tonk Road yesterday?

**Staff:** Yes.

**Customer:** Okay, how was your experience there, ma'am?

**Staff:** It was very good.

**Customer:** Okay, and how was the food there—starters, buffet?

**Staff:** The food was also good.

**Customer:** Okay, and how did you find the service and ambience?

**Staff:** The service and ambience were also right. It was good, it was nice.

**Customer:** Did you have any drinks, ma'am? How did you like any kind of drink?

**Staff:** The drinks were also good, they were nice. We had Coke.

**Customer:** Okay, and Kulfi? Did you try the Kulfi?

**Staff:** What?

**Customer:** Kulfi. How did you like the Kulfi?

**Staff:** The Kulfi was also right, it was good.

**Customer:** Can you tell me, ma'am, how many people visited yesterday?

**Staff:** Five people. There were four adults and one kid.

**Customer:** And how was your booking and billing experience yesterday?

**Staff:** The booking happened very smoothly, there was no hassle.

**Customer:** Okay. And at the time of billing, you didn't face any issue, ma'am?

**Staff:** No, there was no issue at the time of billing either. They gave the anniversary discount that was going on.

**Customer:** Okay, nice to hear that. Any suggestions, ma'am, from your side?

**Staff:** No suggestions. Whatever suggestion I had, I gave it to the staff there. There was a lot of rush, so I said that this is not in your hands, Barbeque Nation will do this, like, make the place a bit bigger. Because there were a lot of people, so according to that, the place was falling a bit short.

**Customer:** Okay, so sorry to hear that, ma'am. I will definitely forward your point to my team.

**Staff:** Otherwise, your team worked very smoothly, everything was great, very great. The managers there were managing everything very well. Now, the space is not in their hands, which they can't do anything about. Other things they managed very well, the food was also good. And from time to time... it wasn't like we had to wait a lot. But yes, the space... according to the rush, you guys should make that place a bit bigger. Because if so many people... now look, that area is a main area and there is only one Barbeque Nation on Tonk Road, which is the main Barbeque Nation in Jaipur, so people come from many places there.

**Customer:** Okay ma'am, I will definitely forward your point to my team for improvement.

**Staff:** Yes. Just get that place made a bit bigger, it will be very good. More guests will be able to come, the capacity of the place will increase. And everything else was very good.

**Customer:** Nice to hear that, ma'am. Thank you so much for your valuable feedback and time.

**Staff:** Yes.

**Customer:** Have a nice day, ma'am. Thank you.

**Staff:** You too. Welcome.
